author: @dremaboy777
text:
Yes, I must order some stuff from you again soon. Maybe I'll have some 'g.o.' in that order. 
I never enter your lotteries. I like the idea of paying (supporting) for your products. 
I'm just waiting until you get around to that M.O.F. (metal-organic-framework) for me (us).
They're amazing on many levels, but I'm thinking of the "surface area". For energy storage.
Anyway... Maybe some day. MOF
